description_long: This is a hardcover yearbook with a visually striking, neon-themed cover design. The front features bold, glowing script and geometric accents, with a stylized architectural line drawing at the bottom. The back cover displays a collection of neon-outlined school mascots and symbols, also set against a dark background with geometric motifs. The spine is dark with vertical neon text, matching the overall color scheme and style. The book appears to be of standard yearbook thickness, with visible pages sandwiched between the covers. The overall appearance is modern and vibrant, likely appealing to students and young adults.
description: A hardcover yearbook with a neon-themed, illustrated cover and spine, featuring bold colors and geometric accents.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, displaying vertical neon text on a dark background.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, featuring neon script, geometric shapes, and a stylized building outline.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is visible, showing the thickness and the light-colored pages between the covers.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, decorated with neon-outlined school mascots and geometric motifs.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a neon-inspired illustration with glowing script and geometric shapes, set against a dark background. A stylized architectural line drawing runs along the bottom, adding a modern, urban feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark blue with vertical neon pink and cyan text, bordered by thin colored lines. The text is bold and stands out against the dark background, matching the cover's neon theme.
